titleStmt.title: SII 6.1125: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1125. (A.R. No. 351 of 1899).On the proper left of the a parasol. The inscription is in several places corrected and written on erasure. IN THE FIFTIETH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śākābdē śailabiṁdutriśasiparimitē jyēṣṭamāsē sitāyāṁ saptamyāṁ saumyavārē sa
tatamadhigṛhaṁ dīpanāya pradīpaṁ prādāt siṁhadhribharttuḥ prakaṭitakusumaṁ mā
lyamatyarabhaktyā śrīmāṁ cāḷākkāvāṁsyassakaḷaguṇanidhirnnallurāhuttarāyaḥ . śrī
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1307 nēṁṭi jyēṣṭa kṛṣṇa saptami būdhavārāna poṭnūri cennurāju
jīyyana tamaku sarvvalōkāśraya cakravartti śrīviṣṇuvarddanamahārājulaina kaḷiṁgamajli
nallurājurābhutturāyaṁḍu tanaku Abhiṣṭhārttasidhigānu śrīnārasiṁhanāthu
ni[ki tirumajjana Avasarānanu] doṁḍāvanamā
lā gānu Akhaṁḍadīpamuṁnnu samarppiṁcenu Ī dīpamuna
ku goṟiyalu nēlivāḍu gaṁṭu bōyuni(ni) koḍuku kūnabōyu
nivaśānanu Iccenu Ītaṁḍu vīni bhōgyamu bujiṁcci nelaku Ēḍu kuṁcā
lunnu Aḍaṁḍu neyi tecci bhaṁḍārāna pravēśamu cēyaṁgalāṁḍu Ī ti
rumāla peṭṭanu bisaḷubhīmu Ānavala gaṁgunu kuṁca mā 1 prāsāda
mu Iccanu Ī prasādamu bhujiṁci I doṁḍavanamāla Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigā peṭṭu
gālāṁḍu Ī dhamu rakṣa . śrīśrīśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 6.1125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
